title: phanera alata
intro: Phanera alata is a plant species commonly known as the 'Ferruginous Tree' or 'Raven's Wing' due to its reddish-brown coloration and distinctive wing-like structure of its leaves. The plant is used in traditional medicine, primarily for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to lower fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Phanera alata is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are typically used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
